migrationsApplied: 0036_webhook_activity_dedupe.sql (applied to BOTH cdp and cdp_e2e via node pg script — psql unavailable; adds nullable activity_log.dedupe_key + a PARTIAL UNIQUE index on (workspace_id, dedupe_key) WHERE source='webhook' for the at-most-once webhook marker)
testSummary: GREEN on a cold run. @cdp/shared: 35 tests (incl. 17 timezone-window: same-day/before/after, overnight wrap, DST spring-forward + fall-back, daysOfWeek keyed on the opening day, inclusive :59 end, isWindowOpen companion, tz-aware bare-wall-clock wait-until). @cdp/runner-webhook: 20 tests (10 SSRF/allowlist: loopback/localhost/[::1], 169.254 metadata + /16, RFC1918 10/172.16/192.168, IPv6 ULA, non-http(s) schemes, deny-by-default empty allowlist, exact+suffix host match, blocked-before-call zero invocations; 10 executeWebhook: rendered url/method/headers/decrypted-secret/merge-body, 2xx ok, 500+maxRetries=2 -> 3 calls, maxRetries=0 no retry, thrown/timeout isolation never-throws, timeoutMs per attempt + default, 4xx not retried, structured outcome). @cdp/service-automation-runner: 112 tests incl. the 3 new REAL-Postgres integration tiers — hour-window.integration (3: park at next-opening ws-tz read back via SELECT next_run_at::text, real buildSweepQuery gate honors next_run_at, resume inside advances, per-workspace NY-vs-UTC park at different UTC instants, DST spring-forward post-transition offset), webhook-node-tick.integration (5: injected client called once with rendered body + decrypted X-Auth, activity_log success row scoped to ws+profile with dedupe_key + redacted detail, 500+retry=1 failure isolation continue-on-failure, 169.254 + off-allowlist blocked with zero calls, re-run of completed enrollment no re-fire), webhook-idempotency.integration (3: two concurrent runEnrollment single-winner -> client fired exactly once + one activity row, crash-recovery duplicate activity insert deduped to one row via ON CONFLICT, MAX_STEPS_PER_TICK guard parks-as-failed). No regressions: @cdp/service-local-api 166 tests pass; @cdp/tests cross-phase 45 pass.
e2eSummary: No browser e2e in scope — this is a backend-only phase (phase.frontend=false). UI for the automation builder is a later phase. Verified instead with the REAL local Postgres integration tier (DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/cdp) + the injected/mocked webhook HTTP client (never a real host) and noop SQS.
commandsRun: git status / git diff (assessed prior-agent progress)
node packages/db/apply0036.mjs (apply migration 0036 to cdp + cdp_e2e)
DATABASE_URL=... pnpm --filter @cdp/service-automation-runner exec vitest run test/hour-window.integration.test.ts
notes:
Completed the prior agent's partial phase-2 work. State on arrival: @cdp/runner-webhook (ssrf/execute/client + its 2 unit suites) and packages/shared/src/timezone.ts window helpers + their unit suite were DONE and green; the package was wired into pnpm-workspace/tsconfig refs/automation-runner deps; the SideEffect 'webhook' variant was added to core.ts. MISSING (now done): processNode was still the phase-1 no-op with the old 5-arg signature (its unit test hour-window-process.test.ts was RED), no tz threading in the tick, no webhook collection/execution, no buildWebhookActivityInsert, no migration, no integration tests, no version bump, no CLAUDE.md update.

What I implemented: (1) processNode gained a 6th `tz` arg and now executes hour_of_day_window via isWindowOpen/nextWindowOpening (advance inside / park-with-next_run_at outside; resumed-but-still-outside re-parks, resumed-and-inside advances). (2) computeWaitNextRunAt is tz-aware for a BARE wall-clock until (zonedInputToUtcIso), explicit-offset untils honored verbatim. (3) actionSideEffect emits a {kind:'webhook'} intent; chainTick collects webhooks (stamping the authoritative node id) WITHOUT calling HTTP. (4) run.ts loads the workspace tz (settings->>'timezone', default UTC, isValidTimeZone) inside BOTH the FOR UPDATE tx path and the legacy CAS path, threads it to chainTick, and runs webhooks POST-COMMIT (new runWebhooks, mirroring enqueueSends) over the injected WebhookHttpClient with the per-workspace allowlist loaded from settings->'webhook_allowlist' (deny-by-default). (5) buildWebhookActivityInsert (core.ts) writes an append-only activity_log row (source/type='webhook', outcome success|failed|blocked, redacted detail) keyed by the per-(automation,profile,node) automation dedupe key with ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING. (6) deps.ts wires the real fetchWebhookClient + decryptSecret/isEncryptedSecret from @cdp/db.

Key decisions (per the approved plan): webhook is AT-MOST-ONCE (post-commit, single-winner FOR UPDATE), continue-on-failure (a webhook is a notification, not a journey gate — failures/blocks are recorded in Activity and the enrollment advances), retry only on >=500/network bounded by 1+maxRetries (never 4xx), SSRF guard runs before any client call (blocked => zero calls, never throws). Allowlist + auth secrets are WORKSPACE config, never client-trusted (inv.2). tenant isolation preserved: tz/allowlist/profile/activity reads+writes all bind workspace_id loaded FROM the enrollment row; the existing runEnrollment write-scope guard still passes.

Migration 0036 (the only one) reuses activity_log + a partial unique index rather than a new table. lint: PASS for all touched packages; the only `pnpm lint` failures are the 7 KNOWN pre-existing web react-hooks/exhaustive-deps 'rule not found' errors in untouched files (EmailDesigner/Activity/ProfileDetail/SegmentBuilder/SimpleScreens) — explicitly out of scope. Not committed/pushed. No builder UI (later phase). Note: `tests/integration/*.js(.map)` show as modified — these are pre-existing COMPILED artifacts regenerated by `pnpm build` from already-committed .ts sources (linkTrackingBaseUrl), unrelated to this change.
